policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="inbound-audit-payload" value="@{ var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true); return new JObject( new JProperty("EventTime", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")), new JProperty("Direction", "request"), new JProperty("RequestId", context.RequestId), new JProperty("TenantId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-tenant-id", "unknown")), new JProperty("UserId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-user-id", "unknown")), new JProperty("CostCenter", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-cost-center", "default")), new JProperty("SubscriptionId", context.Subscription.Id), new JProperty("ApiId", context.Api.Id), new JProperty("OperationName", context.Operation.Name), new JProperty("ClientIP", context.Request.IpAddress), new JProperty("RequestBody", body) ).ToString(); }" />
{{eventhub-endpoint}}?api-version=2014-01 POST
application/atom+xml;type=entry;charset=utf-8
@(new JObject(new JProperty("PartitionKey", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-tenant-id", "default"))).ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None))
@((string)context.Variables["inbound-audit-payload"])

outbound.choose:
<when condition="@(!context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("is-streaming"))">
                <set-variable name="response-body" value="@(context.Response.Body?.As(preserveContent: true))" />
                
                    <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("response-body") != null)">
                
                <set-variable name="total-tokens" value="@{
                    var usage = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["usage-json"]);
                    var val = usage["total_tokens"];
                    if (val == null) { return 0.0; }
                    return val.Value();
                }" />
                <set-variable name="prompt-tokens" value="@{
                    var usage = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["usage-json"]);
                    var val = usage["input_tokens"] ?? usage["prompt_tokens"];
                    if (val == null) { return 0.0; }
                    return val.Value();
                }" />
                <set-variable name="completion-tokens" value="@{
                    var usage = JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["usage-json"]);
                    var val = usage["output_tokens"] ?? usage["completion_tokens"];
                    if (val == null) { return 0.0; }
                    return val.Value();
                }" />
                
                
                    <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("total-tokens") > 0)">
                        <emit-metric name="Total Tokens" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("total-tokens"))" namespace="LLM Token Metrics">
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                        
                        
                        <emit-metric name="Prompt Tokens" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("prompt-tokens"))" namespace="LLM Token Metrics">
                            
                            
                        
                        
                        <emit-metric name="Completion Tokens" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("completion-tokens"))" namespace="LLM Token Metrics">

<when condition="@(!context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("is-streaming"))">
                <set-variable name="outbound-audit-payload" value="@{
                    var body = context.Response.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("EventTime", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
                        new JProperty("Direction", "response"),
                        new JProperty("RequestId", context.RequestId),
                        new JProperty("TenantId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-tenant-id", "unknown")),
                        new JProperty("StatusCode", context.Response.StatusCode),
                        new JProperty("ResponseBody", body)
                    ).ToString();
                }" />
                
                    {{eventhub-endpoint}}?api-version=2014-01
                    POST
                    
                        application/atom+xml;type=entry;charset=utf-8
                    
                    
                        @(new JObject(new JProperty("PartitionKey", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-tenant-id", "default"))).ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None))
                    
                    @((string)context.Variables["outbound-audit-payload"])
